---
title: "Analyse des questionnaires"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

library("tidyverse")
library("readODS")
library("janitor")
library("labelled")
library("baseph")
library("gtsummary")
library("kableExtra")
library("colorspace")
library("visdat")
library("scales")

nax <- c("", " ", "NA", "D")

# Questionnaire HC
hc <- read_ods("datas/questionnaire_hc.ods", na = nax) |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))
bn_hc <- read_ods("datas/questionnaire_hc.ods", sheet = "bnom", na = nax)
var_label(hc) <- bn_hc$titres

# Questionnaire URG
urg <- read_ods("datas/questionnaire_urg.ods", na = nax) |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))
bn_urg <- read_ods("datas/questionnaire_urg.ods", sheet = "bnom", na = nax)
var_label(urg) <- bn_urg$titres

rm(bn_hc, bn_urg)

theme_gtsummary_language(language = "fr", decimal.mark = ",")
theme_gtsummary_journal(journal = "jama")
options(OutDec = ",")

# Étiquettes des niveaux de Likert
lik5 <- c(
  "Pas du tout d'accord",
  "Plutôt pas d'accord",
  "Sans opinion",
  "Plutôt d'accord",
  "Tout à fait d'accord"
)

# Libellés des items (clé = nom de colonne, valeur = libellé court)
labels_communs <- c(
  q1 = "Anxiété",
  q2 = "Informé(e)",
  q3 = "Confiance",
  q4 = "Impliqué(e)",
  q5 = "Compréhension",
  q6 = "Soutenu(e)",
  q7 = "Expression libre",
  q8 = "Environnement"
)

labels_hc <- c(
  labels_communs,
  q9  = "Préparé(e) sortie",
  q10 = "Durée adaptée"
)

labels_urg <- c(
  labels_communs,
  q9_urg  = "Rapidité PEC",
  q10_urg = "Info lors attente"
)

# Items communs aux deux versions
items_communs <- names(labels_communs)

# Items spécifiques HC
items_hc <- names(labels_hc)

# Items spécifiques URG
items_urg <- names(labels_urg)
```

::: panel-tabset

# Hospitalisation conventionnelle (HC)

## Données manquantes

```{r}
#| label: fig-manq-hc
#| fig-cap: Données manquantes — Questionnaire HC

hc |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_hc)) |>
  vis_miss(show_perc_col = TRUE)
```

## Tableau descriptif

```{r}
#| label: tbl-desc-hc
#| tbl-cap: Distribution des réponses — Questionnaire HC

hc |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_hc)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ factor(., levels = 1:5, labels = lik5))) |>
  tbl_summary(
    missing = "no",
    type = all_categorical() ~ "categorical",
    statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
  ) |>
  modify_header(label ~ "Item") |>
  bold_labels() |>
  as_kable_extra() |>
  kable_material(c("striped", "hover")) |>
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")
```

## Distribution des réponses (Likert)

```{r}
#| label: fig-likert-hc
#| fig-cap: Distribution des réponses de Likert — Questionnaire HC
#| fig-asp: 0.8

tit <- "Questionnaire HC — Ressenti des parents (hospitalisation conventionnelle)"

hc |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_hc)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ factor(., levels = 1:5, labels = lik5))) |>
  pivot_longer(everything()) |>
  mutate(name = fct_relevel(name, items_hc)) |>
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = name, fill = value) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_discrete_diverging(palette = "Green-Orange") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = labels_hc) +
  labs(
    title = tit,
    y = "%",
    x = "",
    fill = "Réponse",
    caption = tit
  ) +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, angle = 90, vjust = .5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

## Scores moyens

```{r}
#| label: tbl-scores-hc
#| tbl-cap: Scores moyens par item — Questionnaire HC

hc |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_hc)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "item", values_to = "score") |>
  group_by(item) |>
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(score)),
    moyenne = round(mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    ecart_type = round(sd(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    mediane = median(score, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  mutate(item = labels_hc[item]) |>
  kbl(
    col.names = c("Item", "n", "Moyenne", "Écart-type", "Médiane"),
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_material(c("striped", "hover"))
```

# Urgences pédiatriques (URG)

## Données manquantes

```{r}
#| label: fig-manq-urg
#| fig-cap: Données manquantes — Questionnaire URG

urg |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_urg)) |>
  vis_miss(show_perc_col = TRUE)
```

## Tableau descriptif

```{r}
#| label: tbl-desc-urg
#| tbl-cap: Distribution des réponses — Questionnaire URG

urg |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_urg)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ factor(., levels = 1:5, labels = lik5))) |>
  tbl_summary(
    missing = "no",
    type = all_categorical() ~ "categorical",
    statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
  ) |>
  modify_header(label ~ "Item") |>
  bold_labels() |>
  as_kable_extra() |>
  kable_material(c("striped", "hover")) |>
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")
```

## Distribution des réponses (Likert)

```{r}
#| label: fig-likert-urg
#| fig-cap: Distribution des réponses de Likert — Questionnaire URG
#| fig-asp: 0.8

tit <- "Questionnaire URG — Ressenti des parents (urgences pédiatriques)"

urg |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_urg)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ factor(., levels = 1:5, labels = lik5))) |>
  pivot_longer(everything()) |>
  mutate(name = fct_relevel(name, items_urg)) |>
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = name, fill = value) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_discrete_diverging(palette = "Green-Orange") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = labels_urg) +
  labs(
    title = tit,
    y = "%",
    x = "",
    fill = "Réponse",
    caption = tit
  ) +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, angle = 90, vjust = .5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

## Scores moyens

```{r}
#| label: tbl-scores-urg
#| tbl-cap: Scores moyens par item — Questionnaire URG

urg |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_urg)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "item", values_to = "score") |>
  group_by(item) |>
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(score)),
    moyenne = round(mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    ecart_type = round(sd(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    mediane = median(score, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  mutate(item = labels_urg[item]) |>
  kbl(
    col.names = c("Item", "n", "Moyenne", "Écart-type", "Médiane"),
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_material(c("striped", "hover"))
```

# Comparaison HC vs URG

```{r}
#| label: tbl-comp
#| tbl-cap: Comparaison des scores moyens sur les items communs (HC vs URG)

scores_hc <- hc |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_communs)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "item", values_to = "score") |>
  group_by(item) |>
  summarise(
    n_hc = sum(!is.na(score)),
    moy_hc = round(mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    sd_hc = round(sd(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  )

scores_urg <- urg |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_communs)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "item", values_to = "score") |>
  group_by(item) |>
  summarise(
    n_urg = sum(!is.na(score)),
    moy_urg = round(mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    sd_urg = round(sd(score, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  )

left_join(scores_hc, scores_urg, by = "item") |>
  mutate(item = labels_communs[item]) |>
  kbl(
    col.names = c(
      "Item",
      "n (HC)", "Moyenne (HC)", "ÉT (HC)",
      "n (URG)", "Moyenne (URG)", "ÉT (URG)"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) |>
  kable_material(c("striped", "hover"))
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-comp
#| fig-cap: Comparaison des scores moyens sur les items communs (HC vs URG)
#| fig-asp: 0.7

tit <- "Scores moyens par item commun selon le parcours"

scores_hc_long <- hc |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_communs)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "item", values_to = "score") |>
  mutate(parcours = "HC")

scores_urg_long <- urg |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(items_communs)) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "item", values_to = "score") |>
  mutate(parcours = "URG")

bind_rows(scores_hc_long, scores_urg_long) |>
  group_by(item, parcours) |>
  summarise(
    moyenne = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(score))),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(item_label = labels_communs[item]) |>
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = item_label, y = moyenne, fill = parcours) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = moyenne - se, ymax = moyenne + se),
    position = position_dodge(0.9),
    width = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_fill_discrete_qualitative(palette = "Dynamic") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5)) +
  labs(
    title = tit,
    y = "Score moyen (1–5)",
    x = "",
    fill = "Parcours",
    caption = tit
  ) +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, angle = 90, vjust = .5),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

:::
